# Global Descriptor

**Path:** `global_descriptor`

Methods that encode a complete scan or submap into a descriptor used for candidate place retrieval.

## Scope

**Include:** scan-level descriptor; submap-level descriptor; global retrieval embedding

**Exclude:** methods used only for local registration after retrieval; pure odometry
